channel.title: personal on pixyc.cc
channel.description: Recent content in personal on pixyc.cc

item.title: my hardware
item.description:
• macbook air, m1 / 16gb / 512gb - allows me the freedom of taking all the work i do at home everywhere i want to. my main “““desktop””” at home.

  • desktop. ryzen 3 3100, gtx 1660 super, teamgroup vulcan z 32gb ddr4 @ 3600mhz, 1tb crucial t500, 1tb crucial mx500, 1tb wd caviar blue (from 2013). gigabyte b550m-k. antec truepower 750w from like 2013 (cause the one i had in it broke horribly). montech air 903 max (would recommend!!). mostly just there to host files for me and sometimes stream vr sessions to my quest 3.

  • lg ultrafine 32" 4k 144hz monitor - it’s overkill for my lower-midrange pc desktop but it was a good deal. i still feel weird about having it, but no one wants to buy it. oh well.

  • audio technica ath-m50x - very stimulating headphones. not the most comfortable out there. the hinge broke so i had to glue it back together, now it sits lopsided.

item.title: this site is built with:
item.description:
• pure html and css - the only way i’ve ever known. 100% stolen snippets from random forums and guides, 0% from language models.

  • nova - the only editor i’ve ever loved.

  • hugo - a static site generator, to make adding content easier
